subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be the peace of God and His loving-kindness. The letter of the honoured Hájí Shaykh—upon him be God's peace—was presented before [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک سلام الله و عنایته نامه جناب حاجی شیخ علیه سلام الله در حضور
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
